description: Stores synthesized weekly learning summaries with theme analysis, streak tracking, and trend comparison to previous weeks.

Week.description: ISO week identifier as YYYY-WNN (e.g., '2026-W10'). Used as primary key for upsert.

Summary.description: Narrative 3-5 sentence synthesis of the week's learnings, themes, and notable patterns

Top Themes.description: 2-4 most frequent topic categories from the week's learnings

Learning Count.description: Total number of learnings logged during this week

Most Active Topic.description: Single topic with highest frequency for the week

Key Connections.description: Prose identifying 2-3 cross-learning patterns where insights from different topics reinforce or contrast each other

Learnings List.description: Scannable bulleted index of all learning titles logged during the week

Streak Days.description: Consecutive weeks with at least one learning logged, calculated by backwards scan until gap

Vs Last Week.description: Trend comparison using 20% threshold: More active (>20% increase), Same pace (within ±20%), Less active (>20% decrease)

Source Mix.description: Breakdown of learning sources for the week (e.g., 'Experience: 3, Reading: 2, Conversation: 1')

Generated At.description: Timestamp when the weekly synthesis was generated or last updated

notes: Lazy creation by database name on first /learn:weekly. Idempotent upsert by Week title to prevent duplicate weekly entries. Streak Days recalculated from scratch on each run by scanning backwards through Weekly Insights until finding a week gap. Vs Last Week compares Learning Count to prior week using 20% thresholds.
